basics.name: Jasmine Chan
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.A. in Information and Computer Sciences at the University of Hawaii at Manoa. I expect to graduate in May 2028.

education.institution: University of Hawaii at Manoa, Honolulu, HI

work.company: UH Manoa Information and Computer Sciences Department
highlights: Answering questions and helping students on assignments
Holding Learning Emporium hours for additional assistance outside of class

work.company: UH Manoa Curriculum and Research Development Group
highlights: Provide computer assistance, including basic troubleshooting with software and printers
Input and maintain digital and physical records through data entry and file organization
Use spreadsheets to organize, filter, and sort school and survey data based on specific criteria
Assist with the preparation, distribution, and collection of surveys sent to public schools
Navigated pharmacy software to accurately input, process, and manage prescriptions
Applied problem solving skills to resolve insurance rejections and troubleshoot coverage issues
Provided exceptional customer service in a fast-paced pharmacy environment
Organized drugs and products to optimize inventory management and accessibility
Delivered high-quality customer service by fulfilling smoothie orders and ensuring satisfaction
Maintained a clean work environment by washing dishes and regularly sweeping/mopping

awards.title: Provost Achievement Scholarship
awards.summary: Selective, higher-tier merit scholarship awarded to recognize academic excellence and community impact among incoming freshmen.

awards.title: Manoa Academic Merit Scholarship
awards.summary: Received the highest scholarship award based on excellent high school academic performance and maintaining a GPA of 3.6 or higher.
